ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon_species" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "stamina" INTEGER /* Stamina stat of the Pokémon */,
  "atk" INTEGER /* Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "def" INTEGER /* Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "capture_rate" REAL /* Probability of capturing the Pokémon */,
  "flee_rate" REAL /* Probability of the Pokémon fleeing */,
  "spawn_chance" REAL /* Chance of the Pokémon spawning in the wild */,
  "primary_type" TEXT /* Primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "secondary_type" TEXT /* Secondary type of the Pokémon, if any */,
  "cp" INTEGER /* Combat Power (CP) of the Pokémon */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the Pokémon's image */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation the Pokémon was introduced in */,
  "evolution_form" INTEGER /* Whether the Pokémon is an evolution form */,
  "evolves_from" INTEGER /* The Pokémon that this Pokémon evolves from */,
  "evolves_into" INTEGER /* The Pokémon that this Pokémon evolves into */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spawn_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spawn location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "spawn_rate" REAL /* Spawn rate at the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., park, forest, city) */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the location (e.g., tropical, desert, temperate) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Pokémon type */,
  "weaknesses" TEXT /* Types that this type is weak against */,
  "resistances" TEXT /* Types that this type is resistant to */,
  "immunities" TEXT /* Types that this type is immune to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_spawn_data" (
  "spawn_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spawn data record */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon spawning */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the Pokémon is spawning */,
  "spawn_rate" REAL /* Spawn rate of the Pokémon at the location */,
  "spawn_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the Pokémon is most likely to spawn */,
  "spawn_season" TEXT /* Season when the Pokémon is most likely to spawn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spawn_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_spawn_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES spawn_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_spawn_data_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trainer, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES pokemon_user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_encounters" (
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon encounter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who encountered the Pokémon */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encountered Pokémon */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the encounter occurred */,
  "encounter_date" TEXT /* Date of the encounter */,
  "capture_success" INTEGER /* Whether the capture was successful */,
  "encounter_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the encounter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_encounters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_encounters_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_encounters_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES spawn_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon in battle */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing Pokémon */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date of the battle */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the battle (win, lose, draw) */,
  "battle_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the battle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_battles_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_battles_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the Pokémon's image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., official artwork, fan art, photo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_images_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon the comment is about */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_comments_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon being rated */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_ratings_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
